hooks.command:
hook_results_log="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-${PWD:-.}}/.sa-mise-hook-results.log"
mkdir -p "$(dirname "$hook_results_log")"
if
"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}/scripts/user-prompt-submit-sa-mise.sh"
then
  printf 'plugin=%s event=%s hook=%s status=success\n' "sa-mise-session-start-c" "UserPromptSubmit" "inherited-env-and-path-probe" >> "$hook_results_log"
else
  status=$?
  printf 'plugin=%s event=%s hook=%s status=failure exit_code=%s\n' "sa-mise-session-start-c" "UserPromptSubmit" "inherited-env-and-path-probe" "$status" >> "$hook_results_log"
  exit "$status"
fi
